title: Neocodon hemschinicus
taxonomy: Neocodon hemschinicus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It belongs to the genus Neocodon, which is a small genus of annual plants. Further classification places it in the order Asterales and the class Magnoliopsida. The kingdom to which it belongs is Plantae. Additionally, its full classification can be represented as Kingdom: Plantae, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Asterales, Family: Campanulaceae, Genus: Neocodon, and Species: N. hemschinicus.
